description: Style Note enamor's range of flirty and pretty nightdresses are quite impressive. Capturing the mood of the season in the colours, fabric and designs, your beauty sleep is is made even more comfortable by this range. Enjoy the obvious cutesy look of this pink nightdress. Product Details Cream coloured pointelle knit chemise, has a V neckline, lace detail around the neckline and on the straps, adjustable spaghetti straps, lace bow detail in front, gathers below the bust, pleats running down the centre in front from below the bow detail to the hemline and an irregular hemline Material and Care Fabric: 100% cotton Trims: 92% nylon and 8% spandex Hand wash Do not bleach Do not iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size L
